wordplay_note: A beam of support — the solid everyman on Mars
card_description: Jack Bohlen (meaning "Bohlen = plank / beam; Jack = everyman") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Martian Time-Slip*. Repairman on Mars who becomes entangled with a schizophrenic boy's time-warping perception. Name note: A beam of support — the solid everyman on Mars. The working man trying to stay sane amid capitalist exploitation and temporal collapse. First appears in *Martian Time-Slip*.

reference.brief: Repairman on Mars who becomes entangled with a schizophrenic boy's time-warping perception
reference.significance: The working man trying to stay sane amid capitalist exploitation and temporal collapse
